entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench studied for drought tolerance.

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A trait in sorghum characterized by the retention of green leaves post-flowering.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: GREEN LEAF AREA DURATION (GLAD)
entities.description: The duration of green leaf area post-flowering, used to quantify stay-green.

entities.name: GREEN LEAF AREA (GLA) AT FLOWERING
entities.description: The amount of green leaf area present at the time of flowering.

entities.name: ONSET OF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The timing when the process of leaf senescence begins.

entities.name: SENESCENCE RATE
entities.description: The speed at which leaf senescence occurs.

entities.name: NON-SENESCENCE
entities.description: The trait of resisting or delaying senescence.

entities.name: DIALLEL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A genetic cross-breeding method used to estimate general and specific combining ability.

entities.name: FITTED LOGISTIC FUNCTION
entities.description: A mathematical model used to derive relative and absolute GLAD values.

entities.name: POST-FLOWERING DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental water deficit occurring after the flowering stage.

entities.name: SOIL-WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available in the soil for plant uptake.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The tendency of a crossbred individual to show qualities superior to those of both parents.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The phenomenon where different genotypes respond differently to different environments.

entities.name: ADDITIVE INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where the phenotype is the sum of the effects of individual alleles.

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where one allele masks the effect of another.

entities.name: OVERDOMINANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where the heterozygote has a more extreme phenotype than either homozygote.

entities.name: HYDERABAD, INDIA
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT headquarters where the research was conducted.

relationships.description: location where study on crop was conducted
